title: #fyp #foryou #cute #animation #aidance
prompt_text: A slender, tan-colored alien character with large, expressive eyes and braided hair stands on a dusty dirt path in a sun-drenched desert landscape. The background features soft-focus golden brush and a winding trail. The lighting is warm and natural, suggesting late afternoon sun.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A slender, tan-colored alien character with large, expressive eyes and braided hair stands on a dusty dirt path in a sun-drenched desert landscape. The background features soft-focus golden brush and a winding trail. The lighting is warm and natural, suggesting late afternoon sun.

cinematography.cameraShot: Eye-level medium shot with a shallow depth of field, focusing sharply on the character while the desert background is blurred.

actions: The alien character blinks and smiles at the camera.
The character rhythmically tilts its head left and right in sync with the audio cues.
The character performs a quick, 360-degree spin in place.
The character returns to its original forward-facing position with a cheerful expression.
dialogue: Male voice rhythmic chanting: 'Left, right, left, right, left, right, left, right, left, right...'
Energetic upbeat musical track with a tribal or pop rhythm.
